objective: Approve CART-S01-T01: verify that the CART-B01 fix (static import of mkdirSync and synchronous save()) is correctly implemented and all acceptance criteria are met.
key_changes: AC1 confirmed: mkdirSync statically imported at top-level in single ESM import (src/store/graph.ts line 2)
AC2 confirmed: save() is plain synchronous function with no async/await/dynamic imports
AC3 confirmed: npm run build exits 0 with no TypeScript errors
AC4 confirmed: npm test exits 0 with 31/31 tests passing including CART-B01 regression guard
AC5 confirmed: npm run lint exits 0 with no errors
AC6 confirmed: No CART-B01 entry in CLAUDE.md Known Issues section
mkdirSync ordering verified: called before writeFileSync in save() prevents data loss
No code modifications required — fix was already present in working tree
No cross-cutting impact: change confined to src/store/graph.ts
No dependency additions, no version bump, no migration needed
Security: mkdirSync with { recursive: true } is the standard safe pattern
Follow-up: remove unused enquirer dependency; address load/save concurrency
